title: Using go get -u to fix single CVE — upgrades everything dangerously
code_snippet:
# Developer response to CVE in golang.org/x/net:
$ go get -u ./...
# Result: 47 transitive dependencies upgraded
# Three of them have breaking changes
# CI pipeline fails on unrelated tests
violated_rule: Gradual ramp-up — not instant full load
expected_feedback: Standard: go get -u upgrades ALL transitive dependencies, not just the target. Use targeted upgrade: go get golang.org/x/net@v0.17.0 instead. Batch upgrades across 47 modules introduce uncontrolled risk.
